nasb.text: The Lord reigns, He is clothed with majesty; The Lord has clothed and girded Himself with strength; Indeed, the world is firmly established, it will not be moved.

esv.text: The Lord reigns; he is robed in majesty; the Lord is robed; he has put on strength as his belt. Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved.

cnv.text: 耶和華作王，他以威嚴為衣； 耶和華以威嚴為衣，以能力束腰， 世界就得以堅立，永不動搖。

ccb.text: 耶和华是王，祂身披威严； 耶和华身披威严，腰束力量。 世界坚立不动。

csbs.text: 耶和华作王，他以威严为衣； 耶和华以威严为衣，以力量束腰； 世界就被确立，不致动摇！
